options.command: if [ -n "$MAVEN_PKG_VERSION" ]; then sed -i "s/^version = .*/version = \"$MAVEN_PKG_VERSION\"/" build.gradle.kts && echo "Changed sdk-java version to $MAVEN_PKG_VERSION"; else echo "Using version from build.gradle.kts"; fi

rm -rf build/staging-deploy build/central-bundle.zip && ./gradlew publish && if ! echo "$MAVEN_PKG_VERSION" | grep -q SNAPSHOT; then cd build/staging-deploy && zip -r ../central-bundle.zip . && cd .. && curl -s -w '\nHTTP %{http_code}\n' --fail-with-body -X POST 'https://central.sonatype.com/api/v1/publisher/upload?publishingType=AUTOMATIC' -H "Authorization: Bearer $(echo -n $MAVEN_USERNAME:$MAVEN_PASSWORD | base64 -w0)" -F 'bundle=@central-bundle.zip'; fi
